Class WelcomeController

java.lang.Object
com.example.escriturarapida.controller.welcome.WelcomeController
All Implemented Interfaces:
IWelcomeController
public class WelcomeController extends Object implements IWelcomeController
Controller for the welcome screen.

Handles the initial screen of the application where the player can start a new game session. Implements IWelcomeController to define the required start action.

Version:
1.0
Author:
Cristian Camilo Criollo Diaz

      public WelcomeController()

  • Method Details

    • onHandleStart

      public void onHandleStart(javafx.event.ActionEvent event) throws IOException
      Handles the start button action.

      Loads the game view FXML and transitions the application from the welcome screen to the main game screen.

      Specified by:
      onHandleStart in interface IWelcomeController
      Parameters:
      event - the action event triggered by the start button
      Throws:
      IOException - if the game view FXML cannot be loaded
